CommonsCart
Real photo pair fixture
Local photo assets

All product tiles come from bundled, license-free local images. Two hair dryers are intentionally similar.

Real imagery

A real-photo marketplace still needs region guidance when two items look almost the same.

This fixture swaps pseudo-art for bundled photographs. The two hair dryers come from separate Wikimedia Commons images and are close enough that a small crop is ambiguous globally.

real photos
similar pair
local bundle
guided region
license noted
photo pair

Tools

Workshop Power Drill

Fashion

Ankara Dress

Color-rich fashion tile from a bundled photograph to keep the page photo-heavy and varied.

Pick a tile

The small real-photo crop is safe only after scoping to the intended card region.

Fixture notes

  • All images are local files under assets/.
  • The dryer pair uses two separate CC-licensed Commons photos.
  • The test proves global ambiguity before card-scoped recovery.
  • The opened detail panel confirms the right tile changed state.
